author: Newell
description: Curtis — your polyglot AI chat for Obsidian. 30+ providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, and more), image attachments, long-term memory, slash commands, and inline selection actions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Curtis

name: Curtis

releases.author: JordanNewell
releases.description:
Maintenance release addressing Obsidian community plugin review feedback. No user-facing behavior changes; the plugin is functionally identical to 3.0.0.

**Highlights**
- Manifest description rewritten to comply with directory naming rules
- Static DOM style writes converted to CSS classes throughout
- Type safety overhaul: ~50 `any` types replaced with proper TypeScript interfaces
- Conversation storage migrated to vault-scoped APIs
- Active note resolver migrated off deprecated `workspace.activeLeaf`
- GitHub Actions workflow added for artifact build provenance attestations

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/JordanNewell/curtis-chat/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md) for the full delta.

**Install**: download `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/curtis/`, then enable in Settings → Community plugins.
releases.name: 3.0.1 — Obsidian review cleanup
